seoTitle: Elizabeth Island vs Ellerslie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Elizabeth Island and Ellerslie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Elizabeth Island vs Ellerslie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Elizabeth Island and Ellerslie.
heading: Elizabeth Island vs Ellerslie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Elizabeth Island, Victoria and Ellerslie, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elizabeth Island has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ellerslie (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Elizabeth Island or Ellerslie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Island has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Ellerslie scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Elizabeth Island scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Ellerslie scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Elizabeth Island or Ellerslie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elizabeth Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
